privileged_info_summary: The task uses real astronomical FITS data of the Eagle Nebula (656nmos.fits) sourced from ESA Hubble datasets. The expected output is a 500x500 pixel image saved to '/home/ga/AstroImages/finding_charts/output/m16_finding_chart.png'. A minimum correlation score of 0.35 against the original FITS data is required by the verifier to confirm authenticity and inversion.
